message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Logg inn system

actor "Bruker" as User
rectangle "System" as System
database "Database" as DB

User -> System : Trykker logg inn knapp
activate System
System -->> User : Send til skjema for innlogging
User -> System : Send inn e-mail og passord
System -> DB : Validere brukerdetaljer
activate DB

alt [Logg inn godkjent]
    DB -->> System : Brukerdetaljer godkjent
    deactivate DB
    activate System
    System -->> User : Send til innlogget side
    deactivate System
else [Feil Passord]
    DB -->> System : Feil passord
    deactivate DB
    activate System
    System -->> User : "Du har oppgitt feil passord. Glemt passordet?"
    User -> System : Glemt passord
    System -->> User : Send til skjema for glemt passord
    User -> System : Send inn e-mail adresse
    System -> DB : Verifiser e-mail adresse
    activate DB
    DB -->> System : E-mail adresse verifisert
    deactivate DB
    activate System
    System -->> User : Send e-mail for å gjenopprette passord
    System -->> User : "Vi har sendt en mail til denne adressen..."
    deactivate System
else [Brukeren eksisterer ikke]
    DB -->> System : Finner ikke bruker
    deactivate DB
    activate System
    System -->> User : "Vi finner ingen bruker registrert med denne e-mailadressen"
    deactivate System
end

deactivate System
@enduml
```
